hero.title: Hi, I'm Mohamed Sellak
hero.desc: Full Stack Developer passionate about building modern web applications with React and Laravel.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Mohamed Sellak, a Full Stack Developer passionate about building modern web applications. I love turning ideas into powerful digital solutions.
about.p2: Specialized in React and Laravel, I build smooth user interfaces and robust backends.
about.p3: My goal is to create intuitive, fast and user-centered experiences.

star.situation: Company needed a desktop application to manage internal operations.
star.task: Participate in development and maintenance of the application.
star.action: Implemented features, fixed bugs and improved performance.
star.result: Application more stable and performant, better user experience.

star.situation: Needed a digital solution for an academic project in a company.
star.task: Design and develop a suitable web application.
star.action: Developed frontend and backend with main features integration.

list.title: Tic tac toe
list.desc: Tic Tac Toe game developed in React with Vite and Tailwind CSS, including player vs player and player vs AI modes.

list.title: OnTalk
list.desc: OnTalk is a simple modern instant messaging app for communicating and sharing in real-time.

list.title: Translate App
list.desc: A modern Next.js app to automatically translate text between multiple languages using the MyMemory API.

list.title: Movies Land
list.desc: Movies Land is a web app to explore and discover movies and TV shows via the TMDB API.

list.title: Weather-app
list.desc: Fullstack web app (React + Node/Express) that shows real-time weather for a city via an external API.

list.title: BlogApp
list.desc: Social platform to post articles, add comments, and react with likes.

list.title: Nour Islam
list.desc: Web app showing prayer times based on user location, with Quran integration (text & audio) using APIs.

list.title: TakeIt
list.desc: Online platform connecting event organizers and clients, allowing ticket reservation and purchase online (Final Year Project 2025).

list.title: MemoryGameApp
list.desc: Interactive memory game web app where users match cards, developed for concentration and entertainment.

list.title: Education Land
list.desc: Educational platform for a private primary school to manage registrations, student tracking and payments (Final Year Project 2024).

contact.title: Interested in a collaboration, a project, or an opportunity? Contact me 👇

footer.about_desc: Full Stack Developer specialized in React, Angular, and Laravel. I build modern, high-performance, and scalable web applications.
